hero.tagline: Born from Love. Worn on the Street.
hero.subtitle: Belgian streetwear with a story. From Bratislava to Belgium.

storyTeaser.title: A pet name became a brand
storyTeaser.text: It started with two backpacks, a hostel in Bratislava, and a name that stuck. Loveke — a little Belgian word full of warmth that grew into streetwear with a soul.

story.chapter1: It all started at the Wild Elephants Hostel in Bratislava. Akke was sitting outside with a beer and a cigarette — barefoot, as one does. Then Nastya walked by with her backpack. Love at first sight? Maybe. But first she got stuck in the bathroom for 25 minutes. Romantic? Not exactly. Funny? Absolutely. Once freed from her predicament, they grabbed a drink together. And another. And another.
story.chapter2: The next day. Slovak lunch. Beer and Becherovka at noon — it was vacation, right? Akke said he was sorry she had to go back to Ukraine. 'You can always come along?' she laughed. A joke. Right? Two hours later he was sitting next to her on the train. Tickets booked, no plan, no clean clothes, just adventure and butterflies.
story.chapter3: In Mukachevo they shared their first night. A way too hot motel, one small bed, fully clothed — all very innocent. But they talked all night, laughed, and stared at the ceiling. Some nights change everything.
story.chapter4: From Mukachevo to Kyiv — with every kilometer they grew closer. She showed him all of Kyiv: the golden domes, the cozy cafés, the sunsets over the Dnipro. The best guide he ever had. And then it was time to say goodbye.
story.chapter5: Back in Belgium, the connection never stopped. Messages, voice notes, video calls — day and night. Two countries, one feeling. Distance only made them stronger. Somewhere along the way, they started calling each other 'Loveke'. A little Belgian word full of warmth. Friends loved it. Strangers asked about it. And that's how a pet name became... a brand. From Bratislava to Belgium — Loveke is love you wear.
